codeReview.summary: The fix cleanly resolves the prior blocker: FeeStackValueFlow now matches the canonical 20% social-vault performance fee already introduced by the original token-policy revenue model, and the remaining Social Vault maturity split is now explicitly differentiated as feature maturity (in progress) versus modeled access-gate maturity (planned).

summary: Pass. I reviewed the fix transcript skeleton plus both the original failed diff and the fix diff. The stale 10% fee text/source in src/components/tokenomics/FeeStackValueFlow.tsx was corrected to the canonical 20% figure and the new regression suite now guards fee agreement and the intended maturity differentiation across the affected token-policy surfaces.
